_comment: The weight arrays below will be populated by a script. See experts_net.json for instructions on how to generate random weights for testing.
_script: const arch = modelJson.architecture; modelJson.weights.ih = Array.from({ length: arch.hidden * arch.input }, () => Math.random() * 2 - 1); modelJson.weights.ho = Array.from({ length: arch.output * arch.hidden }, () => Math.random() * 2 - 1); modelJson.weights.bh = Array.from({ length: arch.hidden }, () => Math.random() * 2 - 1); modelJson.weights.bo = Array.from({ length: arch.output }, () => Math.random() * 2 - 1); console.log(JSON.stringify(modelJson));
